_description: Hiring submenu options, externalized from actions.gd get_hiring_options() (L9, #621). Dictionary key order matches the pre-L9 literals.

actions.name: Safety Researcher
actions.description: Focused on AI safety and alignment research

actions.name: Manager
actions.description: Oversees a team of up to 8 researchers

actions.name: AI Ethicist
actions.description: Add philosophical perspective to research (+5 reputation)

actions.name: Interpretability Researcher
actions.description: Probes how models work internally (safety-aligned research)

actions.name: Alignment Researcher
actions.description: Aligns AI goals with human values (safety-aligned research)
